description: List of ingredients (or rather commercial goods?) with their weights. In Arabic script. Headed: "suyyira ʿalā yad Zaghlūl" (sent with Zaghlūl). (Information in part from Baker/Polliack catalog.) Verso: A few more lines in Arabic script, probably from an earlier document.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
